history.text:
[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A black-and-white manga-style illustration shows a young person with light hair and an off-shoulder garment sitting and holding an open booklet near their face, surrounded by speech bubbles and text, with decorative flowers and sparkles filling the page.

Main Subject:
The main focus is a person with long, light-colored hair covering part of their face, looking downward. They wear a light top with one shoulder visible and a patterned lower garment. Their right hand holds a small rectangular item near their mouth or cheek, while their left hand grips the edge of an open booklet. The booklet is angled toward the viewer, showing lined pages filled with handwritten-style text.

Setting:
The scene appears to be an indoor or undefined setting presented as a flat manga panel with no real-world background, instead filled with decorative floral shapes, small stars/sparkles, and dotted shading behind the characters and objects.

Visual Details:
The character is drawn in detailed linework with dot shading and light crosshatching in the hair and clothing. Decorative motifs include small star-like shapes scattered around, flower outlines in the corners, and a dotted pattern background behind the main area. Several speech bubbles with text are placed around the head area and at the right side. At the bottom, a notebook-like booklet occupies the center, with spiral rings along the page edge and a few visible symbols or markings on the page. Another rectangular text box appears on the left side near the bottom, while a taller, vertical text box appears on the right above it. The overall composition is tightly framed, with the character occupying the upper and center portion, and the text boxes and booklet filling the lower half. The camera angle is straight-on, like a single manga panel.

Visible Text:
SHINKAN NO SCANLATION
HEHE...
TAK
KUSANGKA
KITA AKAN
BERAKHIR
DALAM
HUBUNGAN
RAHASIA DI
MANA KITA
BERTEMU
SETIAP
PEKAN...

SAAT ITU,
AKU TIDAK
PERNAH
MEMBAYAKAN
NGKANNYA.

Tandakan pada
Alikaran rencana
tentang rencana
akhirnya!

MisI tercapai!
No important visible text detected.

Practical Summary:
The image depicts a manga scene of a light-haired person holding a small item and an open notebook, with multiple text bubbles and rectangular captions. Decorative flowers and sparkles surround the character, and the lower portion contains lined notebook pages with visible handwritten-style text.
- Hasil Ekstraksi Teks Gambar (OCR):
# Extracted Text

SHINKANN NO SCANLATION

HEHE...

TAK KUSANGKA KITA AKAN BERAKHIR DALAM HUBUNGAN RAHASIA DI MANA KITA BERTEMU SETIAP PEKAN...

SAAT ITU, AKU TIDAK PERNAH MEMBAYANG NGKANNYA.

Taryakan pada
alilakukan rencana
tentang rencana
akhirnya Perkannya!

MisiI ter... apai

# Structured Version

## Caption/Watermark
- **SHINKANN NO SCANLATION**

## Speech bubbles
- **HEHE...**

- **TAK KUSANGKA KITA AKAN BERAKHIR DALAM HUBUNGAN RAHASIA DI MANA KITA BERTEMU SETIAP PEKAN...**

- **SAAT ITU, AKU TIDAK PERNAH MEMBAYANG NGKANNYA.**

## Note on notebook (handwritten text)
- **Taryakan pada**
- **alilakukan rencana**
- **tentang rencana**
- **akhirnya Perkannya!**
- **MisI ter... apai**

## Notes
- Several handwritten lines are partially unclear/garbled in the screenshot (e.g., parts of “Taryakan…”, “alilakukan…”, and “MisI ter... apai”). I transcribed what is visibly legible; the remaining parts are likely incorrect due to low clarity.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
